examples.title: Algorithm: Ethereum Transaction Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates the components of an Ethereum transaction
examples.code:
ALGORITHM EthereumTransaction
INPUT: sender, recipient, value, gasLimit, gasPrice, data
OUTPUT: transactionHash

BEGIN
 nonce = getNonce(sender)
 transaction = createTransaction(nonce, gasPrice, gasLimit, recipient, value, data)
 signature = signTransaction(transaction, senderPrivateKey)
 transactionHash = keccak256(transaction)
 RETURN transactionHash
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of creating an Ethereum transaction

examples.title: Python: Ethereum Transaction Creation
examples.description: Creates an Ethereum transaction using Python
examples.code:
import hashlib
from eth_account import Account
from eth_account.signers.local import LocalAccount
from web3 import Web3

# Set up Web3 provider
w3 = Web3(Web3.HTTPProvider('https://mainnet.infura.io/v3/YOUR_PROJECT_ID'))

# Set up sender account
sender_account = Account.from_key('YOUR_PRIVATE_KEY')

# Set up recipient and value
recipient = '0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f0bEb'
value = 1 * 10**18 # 1 ETH

# Set up gas limit and gas price
gas_limit = 21000
gas_price = 20 * 10**9 # 20 Gwei

# Create transaction
nonce = w3.eth.getTransactionCount(sender_account.address)
tx = {
 'nonce': nonce,
 'gasPrice': gas_price,
 'gas': gas_limit,
 'to': recipient,
 'value': value
}

# Sign transaction
signed_tx = w3.eth.account.sign_transaction(tx, sender_account.privateKey)

# Get transaction hash
transaction_hash = signed_tx.hash.hex()
print(transaction_hash)
examples.explanation: Creates an Ethereum transaction using Python and the Web3 library
